name: ice on ice, 0 C
note: Engineering ToolBox tabulates static and kinetic/sliding friction coefficients.

name: rubber tire on dry asphalt
note: Useful high-friction bound for tire-like rubber contact.

name: rubber on dry concrete
note: Listed range; source table does not split this row into separate static/kinetic values.

name: rubber tire on wet asphalt
note: Wet road range for low-to-moderate friction comparison.

name: wood on dry concrete
note: Listed single coefficient; useful block-like surface anchor.

name: wooden ball on concrete
note: Student-measured normal coefficient of restitution table.

name: steel bearing on concrete
note: Hard ball impact on concrete reference point.

name: glass marble on concrete
note: Small hard projectile on concrete reference point.

name: rubber-band ball on concrete
note: High-rebound soft-elastic object reference point.

name: RocFall bedrock/asphalt default range
note: Rockfall default range; useful as a low-bounce rigid-body contact anchor, not a ball-drop prop test.

name: UAV Realistic Fault Dataset
note: Use as a public fault-detection/log-shape anchor; not a direct contact coefficient source.
modalities: flight logs and onboard telemetry used for realistic UAV fault-detection research

name: DJI Mini 2 accelerometer propeller damage dataset
note: Useful vibration/condition-label anchor for prop damage; not a thrust-loss bench table.
conditions: healthy, bottom-right damaged, bottom-right unbalanced, top-right damaged, top-right unbalanced
